project.title: mouse intestinal crypt AP-MS for proteins that binding circDmbt1
project.projectDescription: This project aims to find the proteins that could bind with circular RNA, circDmbt1 via mouse intestine.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: RNA was enriched with boitin-coupled circDmbt1 rpobe(CR) and control probe(CRR) and was incubated with avidin-binding magnetic beads and incubated with proteins extracted from mouse intesintal crypts and the proeins binded with magnetic beads were eluted and silver staining and protein Mass Spectrometry was performed.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: the proteins detected with circDmbt probe was analysed and among which secondary mass spectra of the protein AGO2 was analysed.
